recent.statement: Shipping disruptions in the Kerch Strait due to proximity to Ukraine conflict
recent.evidence: S6 shows Kerch Strait at 2 daily transits, 73% below its 30-day average, with a nearby Russia-Ukraine conflict flag, evidencing the forecast shipping disruption.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will occur in the Pacific Ring of Fire within the next week, causing significant damage and loss of life.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports a major earthquake with significant damage and loss of life in the Pacific Ring of Fire during the window, so an event that large would have been captured but was not.

recent.statement: A major flood will occur in the UK
recent.evidence: No signal reports a major flood occurring in the UK during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in Louisiana
recent.evidence: Bertha, the only system near Louisiana, is only a Tropical Storm with green notification and zero Category 1+ wind population, far below the required Category 2 hurricane landfall.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop to zero due to escalation of conflict near Ukraine
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait still shows 2 daily ship transits, not zero, so the forecast of transits dropping to zero did not occur.

recent.statement: Andy Burnham will be officially sworn in as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom within the next week.
recent.evidence: No signal shows Andy Burnham being sworn in as UK Prime Minister, an event of this magnitude that would certainly have been captured had it occurred.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Vietnam on July 22nd
recent.evidence: All signals concern cyclones in the Americas/Pacific (near 30,-96; 18.5,-129.9; 26.4,-127.2), none show any tropical cyclone landfall in Vietnam.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.0 earthquake will hit the Philippines on July 20th
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports a magnitude 6.0 earthquake in the Philippines on July 20th, which an event that significant would certainly have generated within the closed window.

recent.statement: The VIX fear gauge will spike above 20.5 in the next 24 hours as geopolitical tensions in Ukraine and Gaza trigger risk-off sentiment
recent.evidence: The VIX reading is 18.79, below the forecast threshold of 20.5, so no spike above 20.5 occurred within the window.

recent.statement: WTI crude oil prices will rise by 3.2% within 24 hours due to increased shipping activity in the Ombai Strait
recent.evidence: WTI crude fell 2.97% rather than rising 3.2%, contradicting the forecast.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in the Gulf Coast within the next week
recent.evidence: Only green-level advisory notifications for tropical storms exist (BERTHA at inland Texas coords with 0 population affected at Category 1+), which show conditions rather than a confirmed Gulf Coast landfall event.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will rise by 3-5% within 24 hours due to increased shipping activity through the Ombai Strait (51% above 30-day average).
recent.evidence: WTI Crude Oil is at 89.99 $/bbl showing -2.39%, a decline rather than the forecasted 3-5% rise.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
